name: THSV StreamBridge - Ko-fi Donations
author: surakage
description: Relays verified Ko-fi Donation triggers into the stable-ID, durable StreamBridge alert pipeline.
triggerSafety: Attach only Ko-Fi > Donation. The action rejects missing stable messageId values and never generates a replacement payment ID.
verificationStatus: Static and simulated relay coverage included; a real or Ko-fi test webhook remains required for live acceptance.
